name: NAF Appy Treats
description: NAF Appy Treats are natural and have been formulated combining only the best quality ingredients including real apple so that you are now able to offer your horse a healthy and delicious treat. NAF Appy Treats are highly palatable to appeal to your horse. NAF Appy Treats are ideal to feed everyday or just now and again as a reward, as a training aid or simply to let him know how much you love him.

name: NAF Minty Treats
description: NAF Minty Treats are formulated using only the best quality ingredients, including real peppermint, so that you can now offer your horse a healthy and delicious treat. They are highly palatable and smell delicious to appeal to both you and your horse. NAF Minty Treats are ideal to feed everyday, or just now and again as a reward, as a training aid or simply to let him know how much you love him.

name: Arika Ripstop 0g Turnout Rug Fondant
description: Add a pop of colour to the field with the Arika Ripstop Turnout Rug. Developed with the same technical features as our best-selling Arika Turnout range, this lightweight yet durable rug is ideal for transitional seasons, protecting your horse and keeping them dry and comfortable in wet weather. The 10k waterproof rated yet breathable 600 Denier rip stop outer shell fabric is cut with a seamless spine to eliminate leaks. It boasts a 10,000mm waterproof and 3000mvp breathability rating for comfort in the field. An antibacterial, anti-static shoulder lining helps balance the rug while enhancing shine. Our design registered two-part skirt works to break tension around the front hemline for field-friendly freedom and flexibility. The patented 45° angled T-bar front closure plus the antibacterial, anti-static shoulder lining ease pressure across the chest and shoulder, reducing rubbing risk and allowing free movement for playtime and grazing. You can choose from the different fill weight options to suit your horse's needs. Rest assured the thermobonded fill won't bunch up or slip down, even when wet. Practical technical features make this rug your go-to turnout option. Reflective details make your horse easier to spot and catch in the dark. The PVC-coated fillet strap is easy to clean. Crossed surcingles keep things secure beneath the belly, and elasticated leg straps offer added security. The detachable neck gives you coverage options, while Arika liner system attachments at the neck and rear mean you can add liners to create versatile temperature control across the seasons.

name: Kudos Bamboo Cooler Mallow
description: The luxurious Kudos Bamboo Cooler stands out with its stylish hexagonal pattern and contrasting suede effect trim. Ideal for travel, box wear or post-exercise cooling, it's a smart rug that delivers on LeMieux's technical design expertise. With super soft bamboo blend outer fabric, Simuwool wither protection and anti-static and anti-bacterial shoulder lining, this rug provides optimal cooling for the key muscle groups after exercise. Simuwool is our unique washable, quick-drying, and durable synthetic ‘wool’, fabricated with the look, breathability and bounce of natural fibres. This premium rug offers an angled T-bar front closure, hook and loop additional fastener and cross surcingles for added security. The silicone dipped tail fillet cord provides a practical finishing touch.

name: Arika Featherweight Rug 0g Navy
description: This technical, self-righting turnout rug is feather-light and designed for transitional weather to keep your horse clean and protected in the field. The custom-made 900 Denier breathable waterproof outer is uniquely cut across the full width of the rug, eliminating leaks with no back seam. Coupled with an antibacterial, anti-static shine-enhancing lining, it stays perfectly balanced on your horse. Security is assured with a design-registered front closure. The top of two sturdy T-bars is 45° angled to relieve pressure across the point of the shoulder, for comfort and freedom of movement. Backed by a sandwich of anti-lint hook and loop tape, you can turn out with total confidence that the rug won’t slip. Traditional rugs, which wrap around the horse’s body, create tension around the shoulder and hind legs, which is restrictive and can cause rubbing. Our globally patented two-part skirt breaks the tension, allowing free movement while holding warmth and shielding your horse's body from splashes. Crossed surcingles with a removable centre strap firmly secure the rug. Reflective safety strips ensure your horse is easy to spot in low light. A silicone-covered fillet strap keeps things clean and neat, while an extra-long tail cover protects the top of the tail. This rug comes complete with a detachable neck and is compatible with the full range of LeMieux rug liners, bibs and necks, giving you full rugging flexibility across the seasons.

name: Arika Reflective 0g Turnout Rug Black
description: See your horse coming from across the field - even in the pitch dark - with this innovative reflective rug from LeMieux. Patterned with reflective LeMieux monograms, the 600 denier ripstop outer picks up and reflects light to make your horse a shining beacon in torchlight! Of course, all the technical quality you'd expect from a LeMieux turnout rug are in place, with a seamless, leak-free spine, 3000mm waterproofing and 3000mvp breathability ratings, assuring your horse's comfort and protection in the field. Our patented 45° angled T-bar front closure and design registered two-part front skirt allow for freedom of movement when playing and grazing. Antibacterial, anti-static shoulder lining and 0g, 100g and 200g thermobonded fill options keep them cosy and comfortable underneath. A PVC-coated fillet strap, crossed surcingles, and elasticated leg straps secure the rug from slipping. A detachable fully-reflective neck is included. Compatible with the LeMieux Rug Liner system, for temperature control options through the seasons.

name: Kudos Rug Liner 50g Navy
description: Add layers of luxury to your horse's LeMieux Arika and Kudos Rugs with this innovative, interchangeable Rug Liner. With deep Kudos shoulder gussets for freedom of movement, it features an antibacterial, anti-static lining with a super-soft peached hand feel to enhance shine on the coat. Its thermobonded fill won't slip or bunch for reliable added warmth and comfort when your horse needs it. An anti-absorbent outer coating helps keep the liner clean. A slightly shorter depth means it won't peek out under rugs for a smart, streamlined look. D-rings with hook and loop tape secure the liner system at the neck, while quick-release trigger clips secure the liner system at the rear. Available in a range of 50g, 100g, 200g and 350g fill weights.

name: Rug Liner 50g Navy
description: A snug secret weapon in your horse’s LeMieux rug wardrobe, the Rug System Liner is a flexible temperature solution, adding a layer of warmth and comfort under Kudos Turnout and Arika Featherweight, Storm-Tek, and all LeMieux Stable rugs. Add an extra layer of warmth and flexibility whenever your horse needs it. Lightly padded with luxurious 50g thermobonded fill that won’t bunch up or slip down, it secures with sturdy D-rings and quick-release trigger clips at the neck and rear of your other LeMieux rug. An anti-absorbent outer coating helps keep the liner clean. A silky antibacterial anti-static lining helps maintain the hygiene and shine of your horse’s well-groomed coat. The Rug Liner gives you ultimate temperature control, extending the use of your main LeMieux rug with additional warmth through cold weather snaps across the year.

name: Kudos Stable Rug 50g Navy
description: A signature smart LeMieux look that you'd expect from the Kudos Collection, coupled with technical fabrics to enhance your horse’s comfort in the stable. Warm and cosy to the touch, this rug is the ideal comfort blanket for your stabled horse. The durable 1000 Denier rip-stop outer repels stains and moisture in the stable. Thermobonded polyester fill won't slip or bunch, not matter if your horse moves or lies down. The unique design-registered 45° angled front closure and shoulder gusset offer full freedom of movement. A self-righting seamfree spine and padded wither deliver ultimate comfort, while the antibacterial, anti-static microfibre lining is soft, warm and enhances shine. A PVC-coated fillet strap with durable fixings offers wipe-clean practicality.

name: Kudos Turnout Rug 50g Navy
description: The LeMieux Kudos rug is the ultimate in comfort and protection for your horse With an innovative, advanced front cut and front neck pads, a greater degree of comfort and movement is achieved, especially when grazing at low level. Featuring our revolutionary, patented two-part skirt system as well as deep shoulder gussets to help prevent tension around the front of the rug and allow a greater range of movement. The central panel self-rights the rug and provides maximum protection from the elements. The angled front closure system features a unique, Design Registered solution to evenly balance and distribute any pressure, helping to prevent rubbing on the point of shoulder and across the chest. Featuring a 1680D Ballistic weave waterproof outer fabric with reflective safety strips and comfort thermobonded fill, with a silky nylon lining which is both anti-static and antibacterial. Compatible with LeMieux liners. Detachable Neck is included. Features Super tough 1680D ballistic waterproof outer Deep shoulder gusset allows full range of movement Detachable neck included Angled T-bar front closure 50g thermobonded fill Antibacterial & anti-static lining to prevent rubbing Fastenings for liner attachments 3 under belly surcingles with detachable central strap Waterproof skirt panels Reflective panels Rear tail strap closure Silicone covered, flexible fillet strap

name: Kudos Stable Neck Cover 50g Navy
description: Complete your signature smart LeMieux look with a Stable Neck Cover from the Kudos Collection. name: Arika Stable-Tek 100g Navy
description: This protective and versatile rug delivers technical excellence with cosy comfort for your horse. Its diamond ripstop outer is durable in the stable, when travelling, or for dry turnout. Luxurious quilted fill and antibacterial, antistatic lining panels make it shine-enhancing, soft and warm in wear. A light yet durable diamond ripstop outer shell repels stains and moisture and won’t snag or tear. It offers supreme breathability to minimise under-rug sweating. Custom crafted with no back seam, the entire width of the rug is fully lined for natural balance across the horse’s back. Lined with 100g lightweight thermobonded polyester fill that won’t bunch up or slip down, this light yet warm rug is carefully designed for balance and horse comfort. Our antibacterial, antistatic lining smooths the coat and sits level in wear. A double T-bar front closure and crossed surcingles firmly secure the rug, while a soft cord fillet string ties up at the rear. Complete with sturdy inner fixings at the neck and hindquarters, this rug is compatible with the full system of LeMieux rug liners, bibs, and necks, giving you full rugging flexibility across the seasons. Detachable neck sold separately. Warm and cosy to the touch, this rug is the ideal comfort blanket for your stabled horse. The durable 1000 Denier rip-stop outer repels stains and moisture in the stable. Thermobonded polyester fill won't slip or bunch, not matter if your horse moves or lies down. The unique design-registered 45° angled front closure and shoulder gusset offer full freedom of movement. A self-righting seamfree spine and padded wither deliver ultimate comfort, while the antibacterial, anti-static microfibre lining is soft, warm and enhances shine. A PVC-coated fillet strap with durable fixings offers wipe-clean practicality.

name: Kudos Thermo Layer Turnout Rug 100g Navy
description: Focus warmth where it’s needed most while reducing bulky rugging, with the rugged Kudos Thermo Layer Rug. Expertly designed to protect key muscle groups yet versatile enough for cross-seasonal wear, it’s radically designed for freedom and self-righting in the field. 100g thermobonded fill is cleverly quilted to concentrate fill density over your horse’s topline, protecting the major shoulder, back and hind quarter muscle groups with cosy warmth. A double layer of fill extends further, to wrap over the horse’s sides, while a single layer down to the hemline gives the benefit of reduced bulk. The heavy-duty 1680 Denier ballistic weave waterproof outer shell is custom-made and cut full width to eliminate leaks. Its silky antibacterial, antistatic lining efficiently balances across your horse’s back for self-righting in any weather. Traditional rugs, which wrap around the horse’s body, create tension around the shoulder and hind legs, which is restrictive and can cause rubbing. Our globally patented two-part skirt breaks the tension, allowing free movement while holding warmth and shielding your horse's body from splashes. Elasticated gussets allow the shoulder to move freely while the elastic hugs the horse's contours to prevent warm air from escaping. A design-registered angled 45° T-bar front closure backed by durable hook and loop tape delivers a snug yet pressure-free fit around the shoulder to allow free movement and prevent rubbing. The padded front neck folds down for extra water protection and grazing comfort. Under the belly, adjustable crossed surcingles and a removable central strap reliably defend your horse from bad weather. Reflective safety webbing and LeMieux branded strips throughout keep your horse extra safe in low light. At the rear, a sturdy PVC-covered fillet strap keeps things fitted and clean, while an extra-long tail cover protects the top of the tail. This rug comes complete with a matching detachable neck and is compatible with the entire system of LeMieux rug liners, bibs and necks. The Kudos rug system offers you ultimate rugging flexibility across the seasons. Technical Specification 1680 Denier ballistic waterproof outer 100g graduated thermobonded polyester fill Self-righting cut 210T antibacterial anti-static lining Padded neck opening The skirt is patented, the front closure is design registered 3 crossed surcingles with detachable centre strap PVC-covered fillet strap Low light safety strips Detachable neck included LeMieux Rug System compatible (sold separately)

name: Arika Ripstop 100g Turnout Rug Alpine
description: Add a pop of colour to the field with the Arika Ripstop Turnout Rug. Developed with the same technical features as our best-selling Arika Turnout range, this lightweight yet durable rug is ideal for transitional seasons, protecting your horse and keeping them dry and comfortable in wet weather. The 10k waterproof rated yet breathable 600 Denier rip stop outer shell fabric is cut with a seamless spine to eliminate leaks. It boasts a 10,000mm waterproof and 3000mvp breathability rating for comfort in the field. An antibacterial, anti-static shoulder lining helps balance the rug while enhancing shine. Our design registered two-part skirt works to break tension around the front hemline for field-friendly freedom and flexibility. The patented 45° angled T-bar front closure plus the antibacterial, anti-static shoulder lining ease pressure across the chest and shoulder, reducing rubbing risk and allowing free movement for playtime and grazing. You can choose from the different fill weight options to suit your horse's needs. Rest assured the thermobonded fill won't bunch up or slip down, even when wet. Practical technical features make this rug your go-to turnout option. Reflective details make your horse easier to spot and catch in the dark. The PVC-coated fillet strap is easy to clean. Crossed surcingles keep things secure beneath the belly, and elasticated leg straps offer added security. The detachable neck gives you coverage options, while Arika liner system attachments at the neck and rear mean you can add liners to create versatile temperature control across the seasons.

name: Kudos Turnout Rug 100g Navy
description: The LeMieux Kudos rug is the ultimate in comfort and protection for your horse With an innovative, advanced front cut and front neck pads, a greater degree of comfort and movement is achieved, especially when grazing at low level. Featuring our revolutionary, patented two-part skirt system as well as deep shoulder gussets to help prevent tension around the front of the rug and allow a greater range of movement. The central panel self-rights the rug and provides maximum protection from the elements. The angled front closure system features a unique, Design Registered solution to evenly balance and distribute any pressure, helping to prevent rubbing on the point of shoulder and across the chest. Featuring a 1680D Ballistic weave waterproof outer fabric with reflective safety strips and comfort thermos bonded fill and a silky nylon lining which is both anti-static and antibacterial. Compatible with LeMieux liners. Detachable Neck is included. Features Super tough 1680D ballistic waterproof outer Deep shoulder gusset allows full range of movement Detachable neck included Angled T-bar front closure 100g thermo-bonded fill Antibacterial & anti-static lining to prevent rubbing Fastenings for liner attachments 3 under belly surcingle's with detachable central strap Waterproof skirt panels Reflective panels Rear tail strap closure Silicone covered, flexible fillet strap

name: Arika Stable-Tek 200g Navy
description: This protective and versatile rug delivers technical excellence with cosy comfort for your horse. Its diamond ripstop outer is durable in the stable, when travelling, or for dry turnout. Luxurious quilted fill and antibacterial, antistatic lining panels make it shine-enhancing, soft and warm in wear. A light yet durable diamond ripstop outer shell repels stains and moisture and won’t snag or tear. It offers supreme breathability to minimise under-rug sweating. Custom crafted with no back seam, the entire width of the rug is fully lined for natural balance across the horse’s back. Lined with cosy 200g thermobonded quilted fill that won’t bunch up or slip down, this warm rug is carefully designed for balance and horse comfort. Our antibacterial, antistatic lining smooths the coat and sits level in wear for pyjama-like levels of softness. A double T-bar front closure and crossed surcingles firmly secure the rug, while a soft cord fillet string ties up at the rear. Complete with sturdy inner fixings at the neck and hindquarters, this rug is compatible with the full system of LeMieux rug liners, bibs and necks, giving you full rugging flexibility across the seasons. Detachable neck sold separately. Technical Specification Diamond ripstop outer 200g lightweight thermobonded polyester fill Breathable Moisture and stain repellent 210T antibacterial anti-static lining Double T-bar front closure Crossed surcingles Cord fillet string LeMieux Rug System compatible (sold separately)

name: Arika Storm-Tek Rug 350g Navy
description: This technical, self-righting turnout rug is lightweight and expertly designed to keep your horse dry and protected in the field. The unique 1200 Denier breathable waterproof outer is uniquely cut across the full width, eliminating leaks with no back seam. Coupled with an antibacterial, anti-static shine-enhancing lining, it stays perfectly balanced on your horse. 350g thermobonded fill wards off extreme cold with warmth that won’t bunch up or slip down. Security is assured with a design-registered front closure. The top of two sturdy T-bars is 45° angled to relieve pressure across the point of the shoulder, for comfort and freedom of movement. Backed by a sandwich of anti-lint hook and loop tape, you can turn out with total confidence that the rug won’t slip. Traditional rugs, which wrap around the horse’s body, create tension around the shoulder and hind legs, which is restrictive and can cause rubbing. Our globally patented two-part skirt breaks the tension, allowing free movement while holding warmth and shielding your horse's body from splashes. Crossed surcingles with a removable centre strap firmly secure the rug. Reflective safety strips ensure your horse is easy to spot in low light. A silicone-covered fillet strap keeps things clean and neat, while an extra-long tail cover protects the top of the tail. This rug comes complete with a detachable neck and is compatible with the full range of LeMieux rug liners, bibs and necks, giving you full rugging flexibility across the seasons. D-rings with hook and loop tape secure the liner system at the neck, while quick-release trigger clips secure the liner system at the rear. Available in a range of 100g, 200g and 350g fill weights.

name: Bridle Mattress Black
description: The best saddlery and tack deserves the best care. Ideal for travel and at home, this sumptuous Bridle Mattress provides protective cushioned support for the headpiece of your bridle in storage. Keeping the headpiece supported helps the rest of the bridle hang correctly, preventing warping or sticking, and taking the best possible care of your kit. An embossed name holder will ensure easy identification of kit, while the mattress securely fixes to a bridle hook with hook and loop straps. Crafted in quilted suede with contrast piping and the signature LeMieux tab, it complements the Saddle Mattress for a smart tack room set-up.

name: Gel-Tek Anatomic Jumping Girth Brown
description: Anatomic high performance long jumping girth that maximises comfort Gel impregnated pockets on leading edge of girth allow muscle to move freely without restriction & sensation of blocking Combination of dynamic gel & ultra soft leather absorbs and spreads pressure evenly across the surface area of the girth Contoured shape and cut back allows maximum freedom & space behind the elbow Thinner tapered ends even pressure at the edge of the girth Allows less restricted movement of the front legs and can improve stride and freedom in the air Enhances saddle stability and eliminates discomfort & rubbing Integrated clip for easy draw rein, breast plate or martingale attachment Strong double elastic straps on either end minimise stretch whilst allowing a degree of flexibility Small D-Rings for optional attachment

name: Safety Stud Tap Black
description: This high quality Safety Tap has a specially designed handle to give maximum grip and comfort in both wet and dry conditions. This eliminates cross threading and refurbishes damaged threads and leaves a clean threaded stud hole. A great asset to any stud kit!

name: Stud Plugz Orange
description: The newest and best rubber plug on the market. A small hole in the centre allows you to use a horseshoe nail for easy removal.

name: Bridle Number Holder Black
description: The LeMieux Leather Number Holder provides a sophisticated way to display your number at competitions. Attaches easily to the bridle, smart, strong and won't slip. Matching saddle number holder also available.

name: Merino+ Noseband Guard Brown
description: Comfortable discreet way to pad your noseband.

name: Vector Stirrup Leather Black
description: Made from high quality soft oiled leather with stainless steel buckles. Designed for a comfortable feel under the leg and thigh. Nylon inner core prevents stretching and unevenness.

name: Vector Stirrup Leather Brown
description: Made from high quality soft oiled leather with stainless steel buckles. Designed for a comfortable feel under the leg and thigh. Nylon inner core prevents stretching and unevenness.

name: D-Ring Extender Brown
description: The LeMieux D-Ring Extender is designed to tie neatly around your saddle D-rings and are the perfect little tool for anyone with extra layers under the saddle, such as using a half pad, so that your saddle pad D-ring tabs can still attach safely and securely to your saddle. Also great for adding extra room for tack that attaches to your saddle's D-rings such as martingales and breast plates. Made with quality leather, solid metal D-ring and super strong nylon loop. Sold in pairs

name: Gumbits
description: These amazing little balls, from a specialist company in Atlanta, USA, are 'candy for a horse's mouth' a god send for horse's who can be difficult with the bit. When the mouth is agitated and tense grinding often occurs which can be a very hard habit to break. Grinding can even occur when horses are on a perfectly good contact, engaged and working in a correct shape. GumBits prevent as well as stop grinding and associated problems with the mouth. GumBits once chewed form a gel like film over the teeth that prevents abrasion of the teeth. Activates salivation Encourages submission Eliminate teeth grinding Promotes chewing activity

name: Gel-Tek Anatomic Mono Girth Black
description: Anatomic high performance girth that maximises comfort Gel impregnated pockets on leading edge of girth allow muscle to move freely without restriction & sensation of blocking Combination of dynamic gel & ultra soft oiled leather absorbs and spreads pressure evenly across the surface area of the girth Contoured shape allows maximum freedom & space behind the elbow Scalloped shaped ends even pressure under the buckles, which are splayed and set at a slight angle Allows less restricted movement of the front legs and can improve stride length Enhances saddle stability and eliminates discomfort & rubbing A minute degree of elastication is built into each buckle attachment - just enough for flexibility without effecting saddle fit or girth tension Integrated clip for easy draw rein, breast plate or martingale attachment

name: Gel-Tek Anatomic Short Stud Girth with Magnet Black
description: This anatomic high performance girth comes with gel cushioning that maximises comfort and allows the muscles to move freely. The anatomically shaped Gel-Tek Anatomic Short Stud Girth is designed to provide maximum comfort and protection to the horse during riding. It features gel impregnated pockets on the leading edge that allow the muscles to move freely, resulting in improved stride and less restricted movement of the front legs. The girth also has thinner, tapered ends that evenly distribute pressure at the edge, preventing chafing and ensuring the horse's comfort. To enhance protection, the girth features a low profile strike area that shields the horse from studs. The girth is also equipped with an integrated clip for easy attachment of draw reins, breastplates or martingales. D-rings allow for optional attachments, while a magnetic flap provides a neat finish to the integrated clip. The girth is secured with large hook & loop straps that protect the girth straps and ensure a secure fit. Overall, this girth is a practical and comfortable option for horses and riders who prioritise protection and mobility during riding.

description: The LeMieux Integrated girth is suitable for dressage saddles and all Mono flap saddles including jumping saddles. The girth is extremely strong with a lovely flexible webbing construction, lined with luxurious high density faux fur which is soft, light & breathable. The integrated girth has been designed to allow maximum freedom of movement with optional centre attachments for schooling aids.

name: Vector Pro Stirrup Leather Black
description: Made from high quality soft oiled leather with stainless steel buckles. The underside leather is slightly raised to improve stability. Designed for a close contact feel under the leg and thigh. Nylon inner core prevents stretching and unevenness.

name: Vector Pro Stirrup Leather Brown
description: Made from high quality soft oiled leather with stainless steel buckles. The underside leather is slightly raised to improve stability. Designed for a close contact feel under the leg and thigh. Nylon inner core prevents stretching and unevenness.

name: Opera Stirrup Black
description: The Opera stirrup is a completely new concept in riding because of its special patented loop construction, which allows the stirrup to adhere to the saddle flap, avoiding friction between the leg and the stirrup. This gives a more correct, comfortable and secure ride as the stirrup hangs with perfect balance, angle & flexibility. The large laser cut stainless steel stirrup pad gives riders better grip and relieves tension in the hips, knees, ankles and calves. The foot plate is supported by twin moulded side sections made of composite material in injection. Each side works independently, spreading load & absorbing shock. Each set of stirrups now comes with the complete set of country flags so you can personalise them how you wish.

name: Arena AluPro Stirrup Blue
description: The stirrup bow is made of aluminium, while the opening arm is made of a special polyamide material. The stirrup pad is made of polyamide, too, and the tread is fabricated from stainless steel. The "AluPro" model, in principle, provides the same function as the Arena "HiFlex", but it is based on different materials. Main Features Unique, stress-actuated locking and release mechanism located between the lower end of the outer, pivoting stirrup arm and the foot support plate/tread. Easy and reliable "one-click" re-engagement of the stirrup locking and release mechanism once triggered. Special Spring Effect Due to its design and construction which is based on flexible polymers, the stirrup conveys a less rigid and much more comfortable feeling to the rider than with conventional products. The springing stirrup bow and foot support assembly is capable of effectively absorbing and compensating for short-term and sudden impacts exerted through the rider's weight from the top, e. g. during posting, jumping or hacking. Considerable benefits for the rider: strong relief of foot bottoms, ankles, knees and hips, therefore, also very interesting for riders suffering from orthopaedic problems.

name: Mesh Brushing Boots White
description: Superb quality, incredibly smart brushing boots for schooling and competition, now with an updated strike guard with debossed LeMieux branding. This tough and durable reinforced panel protects the inside of your horse's leg from brushing knocks and scrapes, without adding undue weight or bulk. These lightweight boots have a perforated, breathable mesh lining, a protective, grained PU leather palm, and neat PU leather hook and loop tape straps. The 3D mesh outer places these among the most breathable brushing boots on the market. Soft and smooth binding around the outer edges prevents rubbing. They are suitable for use on the front or hind legs. Sold in pairs.

name: Fleece Edged Mesh Brushing Boots White/Natural
description: The best combination of comfort and breathability. An ideal solution for sensitive skinned horses or when fully lined fleece boots prove too much bulk. Lightweight, perforated 3D mesh encourages airflow inside the boot keeping legs cool. Edged with super soft fleece to prevent rubbing and maximise comfort. The tough, durable PU leather strike pad provides protection from brushing and knocks and the latest low profile hook & loop prevents the pick up of riding surface material. Our signature double top strap makes for quick and easy attachment. Strong, elasticated straps keep the boots in place without over-tightening and are finished with branded rubber end-pullers for convenient removal. Suitable for use on front & hind legs. Sold in pairs.

name: WrapRound Leather Over Reach Boots White
description: New style PU faux leather overreach boots. WrapRound closure that's adjustable, as well as easy & quick to remove. Includes a new double lock feature for added security. Ideal schooling, warm-up & travelling boot. Sold in pairs

name: ProShell Brushing Boots White
description: A new generation of brushing boot from LeMieux with greater all-round protection. Moulded PU outer shell offers superior support and shields against strikes, whilst remaining very flexible. These boots are strong enough to deflect an impact but not restrictive and rigid in any way. Unlike a regular brushing boot which relies on a single inside padded area, the ProShell boot offers 360 degree protection. Strategically placed vents ensure the release of excess heat and the soft perforated inner lining encourages the movement of air and is soft and kind to the horse's leg. These boots are extremely versatile, tough enough to be used for turn out but smart enough to use at shows. ProShell brushing boots could not be easier to use and care for. They have minimal up-take of water making them ideal all year round boots. Convenient to machine wash and quick to dry. Can be used on front or hind legs. Sold in pairs.

name: Motionflex Over Reach Boot White
description: With a strong lightweight shell, these innovative Motionflex Over Reach Boots are a radical re-imagining of traditional, rigid over reach boots. Carefully designed to avoid rubbing and pressure of more rigid over reach boots, as well as enhancing your horse's comfort, they offer all-around protection. Radial compression lines run around the boot, which flex under pressure as the fetlock lowers for optimal performance. Plus, 360° coverage means these boots are never in the wrong position.

name: Elevate Polo Bandages White
description: Elevate your performance with these superior quality super soft micro-fleece Polo Bandages. The stand-out design features a signature LeMieux embossed metal motif on PU leather backing, with a secure hook and loop wrap fastening. Sold in a set of 4. Full = 3.8m length, Pony = 2.4m length

name: Motionflex Dressage Boot White
description: Our lightweight and highly flexible Motionflex Dressage Boots are carefully designed to wrap around your horse's leg with minimum restriction. The close-fitting design ensures zero impact on your horse's flexibility. They feature a light and breathable 3D mesh inner lining to keep tendons cool and comfortable during dressage competitions or practice sessions at the yard. The easy wrap-around style of closure makes things simple when you're scrambling to get your horse ready during early morning starts. Then there's the moulded TPU tendon joint guard, which provides extra support when your horse is in motion.

name: Loire Polo Bandages White
description: Protect and support your horse’s legs during exercise the traditional way with our luxurious Loire Polo Bandages. These premium fleece exercise bandages are made from the highest quality fleece to avoid pilling, and feature Loire satin end pieces and the signature LeMieux embossed metal motif for an extra touch of class. They can be used on their own or with LeMieux under bandage pads for extra protection. LeMieux Loire Polo Bandages come in two sizes (available colours only) and are sold in a set of four within a zipped case. Pony: 2.45m length Full: 3.8m length Loire Polo Bandages are designed to coordinate with Loire Saddle Pads and Loire Fly Hoods for a truly stunning matching look.

name: Schooling Boots White
description: Highly protective all-round boots for schooling and general riding - ideal for dressage involving more intense lateral work. Contoured to fit joint and tendon with a close fit - wear on either the front or hind legs. These boots protect the lower limb with a moulded, flexible polycarbonate strike-proof shell integrated into the shock-absorbent lining. The polycarbonate shell is lightweight, durable and absorbs shock by dissipating energy on impact. A convenient wipe-clean PU-grained leather outer gives a high-quality look and feel. Adjustable hook and loop fastening straps deliver a precise fit. Sold in pairs.

name: Grafter Brushing Boot Benetton Blue
description: These highly durable brushing boots offer exceptional value and are perfect for schooling, competitions and turnout. Ideal for fitting both the front or the hind legs, the fabric is soft, light and breathable to keep your horse comfortable and protected all day long. We've added a new strike guard design and soft binding edge to enhance your riding style, while the mixy matchy, colourful straps feature secure hook and loop closures. Sold in pairs.

name: Carbon Air XC Hind Boots Black
description: The new LeMieux Carbon Air brings the latest in protection design with a smart and durable XC boot. These fully vented XC boots allow air to strategically flow through the boot to keep tendons cool. Cutting edge shock absorption and tendon support with a flexible polycarbonate strike guard give these boots superior protection to prevent injury while still keeping a super lightweight profile. The close fit new perforated EVA lining is ultra soft and non-slip with elasticated central locking strap keeps the boot securely in place. These boots are perfect to withstand the rigour of cross country and can also be used as tough everyday work boots. Sold in pairs. Individual boot weight = max 202g

name: Carbon Air XC Front Boots Black
description: The new LeMieux Carbon Air brings the latest in protection design with a smart and durable XC boot. These fully vented XC boots allow air to strategically flow through the boot to keep tendons cool. Cutting edge shock absorption and tendon support with a flexible polycarbonate strike guard give these boots superior protection to prevent injury while still keeping a super lightweight profile. The close fit new perforated EVA lining is ultra soft and non-slip with elasticated central locking strap keeps the boot securely in place. These boots are perfect to withstand the rigour of cross country and can also be used as tough everyday work boots. Sold in pairs. Individual boot weight = max 202g

name: Vogue Headcollar & Leadrope Powder Blue
description: Pamper your horse or pony in distinctive LeMieux style with this soft headcollar, featuring fleece inserts at the cheeks, poll strap and nose band. The super soft fleece inserts do two jobs - they ensure even pressure distribution, plus they're fitted with extra padding for the greatest possible comfort. The cheek straps are lined with fleece to eliminate rubbing on your horse's skin. Not only stylish but practical, too, it's multi adjustable at the curb and poll strap (adjustable from both sides), with a trigger clip throatlash for easy use. Each Vogue Headcollar comes with a matching colour-coordinated 1.8m Leadrope.

name: Essence Leadrope Powder Blue
description: The quintessential 2m leadrope, in classic colours. With a sturdy and secure LeMieux branded trigger clip for attachment to your horse's headcollar, these colourful leadropes mix and match our entire range of stylish headcollars. Durable, lasting and easy on the hands.

description: An essential item in any rider's kit, the Rope Control Headcollar offers a safe and effective way to handle young or lively horses. Keep safe in style. Designed for perfect control in hand, this headcollar is ideal for lively horses and ponies, stallions and young stock. These headcollars are designed for in-hand use only. Not suitable for tying up.

name: Aspen Headcollar Herringbone
description: Step out in smart matching style with this soft-touch headcollar from the Aspen Collection. Designed in luxurious herringbone fabric to match back to the Aspen Saddle Pads, Fly Hoods and rider wear, it's sure to stand out from the crowd. Durable nylon construction makes it as strong as it is stylish, with brushed metal finishings for added glam. Adjustable at the curb and double adjustable at the headpiece, for a comfortable fit, it has a trigger clip throatlash for ease. Leadropes sold separately.

name: Patent Leather Headcollar Black
description: Ideal for competition outings or simply elevating your every day, this patent leather headcollar is a serious show-stopper. Every detail is perfected, with stunning patent leather piped sections, stamped leather pieces and gunmetal fixings of the highest quality with subtle LeMieux branding. An anatomically shaped headpiece offers comfort across the poll, with padded sections on the headpiece and noseband for the ultimate in luxury horse headwear.

name: Classic Fly Hood Powder Blue
description: LeMieux's premium quality fly hoods are made with protection and style in mind. Designed in an array of colours, a Classic Fly Hood is the ideal way to top off your colour-coordinated equestrian look. The 100% cotton face veil is crafted in handmade four-way stretch crochet and edged with luxurious double-twist braid. This makes it secure and close-fitting under the bridle. The veil is finished with sophisticated embroidered LeMieux branding. The face veil is complemented with soft, comfortable elastane ear fabric, designed to protect your horse's ears from flies, dust and distractions.

description: The newly designed Acoustic Diamante Fly Hood maintains all the fantastic qualities from our Acoustic range, with an improved fit to accommodate the more anatomical style bridle head pieces. The deeper section behind the ears gives a secure fit with the ergonomical, low profile shape around the ears providing ultimate comfort. Sharp noise is absorbed by a layer of dense sound proof micro-foam Inner lining of ultra-soft bamboo ensures maximum comfort Three-way advanced fabric technology Increased concentration and relaxation Soft elastane outer for the perfect fit Added touch of sparkle with diamantes These acoustic fly hoods are British Dressage legal in accordance with rule no. 134: "Ear Covers and Fly Hood Ear Covers and Fly Hoods are permitted for all competitions, and may also provide noise reduction. Ear cover/fly hoods must not cover the horse's eyes. The cover/hood should be discreet in colour and design."

name: Vogue Fly Hood Burgundy
description: Perfect for when subtle style is called for, the Vogue Fly Hood is crafted from handmade crochet knit, simply trimmed with twin twisted rope braid. The Vogue Fly Hood is not just about style, it's about comfort. The high-density ear fabric provides a protective barrier against dust, flies, and other distractions. It even softens sound, helping some horses relax and concentrate on their job. There's no branding visible apart from a single LeMieux tab.

name: Loire Fly Hood Benetton Blue
description: LeMieux's luxurious Loire satin fly hoods are made with protection and style in mind. Designed in an array of colours, a Loire Fly Hood is the ideal way to top off your Loire horse wear collection. The veil is crafted in handmade 100% cotton crochet with four-way stretch for a secure fit under the bridle. It's edged with a decadent braid or cord trim. A stylish satin front piece features the signature LeMieux logo as a badge motif. The veil is complemented with soft, comfortable elastane ear fabric, designed to protect your horse's ears from flies, dust and distractions.

name: Acoustic Fly Hood Inserts Black
description: Made to fit comfortably into the ears of any of our Fly Hoods*, these dense sound-proof foam inserts absorb loud, sharp sounds to minimise distraction and promote relaxation and concentration. A game-changer for some horses, this could give the edge to your next performance. Try it and see! *Choose the size of Acoustic Fly Hood Inserts to match your Fly Hood: Small Acoustic Fly Hood Inserts will fit any Small Fly Hood, Medium Acoustic Fly Hood Inserts will fit any Medium Fly Hood, and Large Acoustic Fly Hood Inserts will fit any Large Fly Hood.

Coordinated soft shell patch trim and matte silicone LeMieux branding create a sophisticated look. Soft, comfortable ears with acoustic lining provide reliable protection from loud sounds and distractions, ideal for aiding concentration during training and competition, with dense soundproof micro-foam that absorbs noise.

description: It's bath time! The soft-grip hold is easy on your hand, and the whole brush bends to reach those hard-to-get-at places. An elasticated webbing hand strap makes for a comfortable hold while the raised sponge centre and soft bristles work their magic. name: Elite ProKit Lite Grooming Bag Navy
description: A convenient, lightweight grooming bag that goes anywhere! The ProKit offers numerous zip up compartments and a choice of a grab handle or adjustable shoulder strap. Ideal for travelling or just around the yard.

name: Tendon Chill Boots Black (Pair)
description: Made for quick ease-of-use as a priority, these close fitting ice boots target the tendons with maximum chill in the shortest period of time. The unique Hypo-Freeze Gel remains soft and contours around the lower limb ensuring optimum surface contact with tendons and fetlock joints. A swept-up rear section covers the high suspensory area often neglected in other boots. These neat boots are low profile so ideal for travelling and away at shows, as well as for everyday use at home. Due to their lack of bulk they can fold flat and be easily frozen in confined spaces. The outer fabric acts like a soft wrap easy to manage and clean. Regular use of Tendon Chill boots for short periods (10-20 mins) after intense exercise for preventative purposes. The sooner temperature of tendons can be reduced after work the better. This can apply just as much to high intensity dressage, as galloping, jumping and x-country. Can be worn on front or hind legs. Sold in pairs.

name: Brite White Shampoo
description: Brite Whites can be used neat on stains (simply massage onto area leave for five minutes and rinse out) or used as normal shampoo. Brite Whites leaves the coat soft, shiny and snow white. Guaranteed! Brite Whites is a dream come true for greys, coloureds and those dirty white socks!

name: Popcorn's Pony Pick n' Mix
description: Give your pony a yummy treat with Popcorn’s fun mix of apple bits, banana chips, beetroot and carrot flakes, and dried grass – all mixed with fruity popcorn, grass pellets, and a little splash of vanilla flavour. It’s the perfect Pony Pick n’ Mix for your extra-special pony!

name: Mega-Tek Coat Rebuilder
description: Revolutionary formula and a technological breakthrough. Strengthens without the use of synthetic polymers, oils, or petroleum based products. Strengthens coat hair and manes and tails. Encourages robust re-growth in areas effected by scaring and rubs - esp winter rug rubs on shoulders, withers and boot rubs. Also makes hooves grow faster and makes them 30% stronger. Coats: Megatek makes hair healthier and stronger so mane and tail won't break so easily. Amazing results when used on manes rubbed out with combo rugs, neck covers, hoods and sweet-itch etc, Amazing results when used on dry brittle manes and tails to give them added strength & length. This is also great on feather if your horse needs to increase the length or thickness. Hooves: Makes hooves grow from 10% to 50% faster and makes them 30% stronger. Sand cracks are reduced, quarter cracks heal faster, shoes hold better.

name: Hands On Glove
description: This is hands on grooming as you've never experienced it before! HandsOn Gloves are a revolutionary concept that go far beyond traditional curry combs, mitts & scrubbers on the market today. Wet or dry, they won't slip or fall off while providing an incredible grooming experience - as close to nature as you can get! Perfect combination of scrubbing nodules on fingers and palms Gets to grips with the toughest stains & winter coats Great de-shedder simply & easily releasing accumulated hair Massages muscles & stimulates circulation Use both hands simultaneously to groom Gloves tactile touch gently cleans sensitive areas like legs, faces & ears Easy to hold hose pipes & ropes Hands and fingernails stay clean and dry Give your horse or dog a bonding & relaxing experience he won't forget Folds away into pocket or grooming kit

name: Show Sheen
description: As the world's #1 selling hair polish, ShowSheen® is uniquely formulated to provide the serious horse owner with an unsurpassed multi purpose grooming aid. It coats each hair shaft to keep manes and tails tangle-free, while its conditioning action reduces static fly-aways. The coat becomes smooth and sleek, accentuating the body tone and definition. It also repels dust, dirt, and stains, protecting your grooming job and keeping your horse cleaner longer. Can reduce grooming time by as much as 80% The unique formulation provides the serious horse owner with an unsurpassed multi purpose grooming aid Repels dirt, dust. and stains to save grooming time More horses have won ribbons with ShowSheen than any other grooming product in the world ShowSheen® is considered the #1 selling hair polish in over 25 countries around the world

description: The synthetic bristles on the LeMieux Flexi Soft Body Brush provide a comfortable but efficient clean, with the flexi design allowing you to reach almost every part of the horse's body. name: ProIce Freeze Boots Black
description: LeMieux ProIce Freeze Boots provide targeted ice cooling directly to tendons and joints. The foil lining effectively insulates and prolongs the cold effect, whilst the soft mesh lining protects skin from freeze burn and allows for maximum transfer of cold. The unique Hypo-Freeze Gel remains soft and contours around the lower limb ensuring maximum surface contact with tendons and joints. Regularly use ProIce boots for short periods (20-30mins) after intense exercise for preventative purposes to ensure ligaments, tendons and joints remain tight. The sooner the temperature of tendons can be reduced after work the better. This can apply to high-intensity dressage as well as galloping, jumping and XC. Sold in pairs to fit the front and hind legs.

name: Mini Holdall Juniper
description: A handy holdall featuring the Mini LeMieux Pony characters. This funky carry-all features an adjustable jacquard horseshoe-patterned shoulder strap and webbed top carry handle. Two useful zipped compartments with internal pockets will keep your belongings neat and organised. Use this versatile bag for days out and picnics, or as a changing bag, lunch bag, grooming bag or for carrying your toy pony accessories!

name: Mini Grooming Set Red
description: Whether grooming on the go or keeping things organised at home, this Mini Grooming Set is a stylish and handy essential to keep your pony in tip-top condition. With everything needed for a thorough groom, a smart and durable canvas carry bag holds three wooden-handled brushes with natural and synthetic bristles for a choice of soft or firmer cleaning. A star-shaped sponge, hoof pick and rubber curry comb, plus a tangle-busting mane and tail brush with LeMieux logos, complete the set.

name: Citronella Slosh
description: Give your horse a wash with a slosh! Ideal for cooling summer bathtimes, this non-rinse wash leaves your horse's coat fresh, free from grease and very unattractive to flies! After a long, hot day in the field, this non-rinse wash is your go-to for refreshing and restoring your horse's coat. Low-lathering and non-rinse, it's easy to use neat or partially diluted, making it a powerful and cost-effective solution.

name: Flexi Massage Brush Navy
description: Treat your horse to some TLC with the LeMieux Flexi Massage Brush. The soft rubber nodules not only feel great on a horse's skin, but can stimulate circulation and provide a deep clean, getting rid of loose hair, dust and dirt. The flexible shape allows the brush to reach almost every part of the horse's body. The ergonomic shape fits perfectly into the hand, reducing wrist strain while allowing you to have a better grip when holding the brush. An elasticated strap guarantees a perfect fit.

name: Artisan Quarter Mark Comb Brown
description: The Artisan Quarter Mark Comb is a compact, fold-away essential designed for precision and convenience. Crafted with versatility in mind, this fine-tooth comb features three different teeth width options in one tool, allowing you to create clean, defined quarter marks with ease. Whether you're getting show-ready or refining your technique at home, this comb delivers professional results every time. Its portable, foldable design makes it perfect for keeping in your grooming kit, ensuring you’re always prepared to achieve flawless markings.

name: Artisan Metal Curry Comb Brown
description: Made to pair with the rest of our Artisan range of brushes and grooming tools, this has metal teeth for combing away dirt and dry sweat from your Artisan brushes as you groom for a thorough clean.

name: Arika Camo-Tek Fly Rug Macaron
description: The result of careful research into fly attraction and insect behaviour on the part of our diligent design team, this rug features a high-contrast camo pattern. The effect dazzles flies vision, stopping them 'seeing' the horse's shape and preventing them from landing. Further to this, the technical fabric, paired with breathable mesh and extra coverage, makes this Camo-Tek Fly Rug a full force fly fighter. There's a belly flap feature, with a longer skirt hem and a longline tail flap for extra protection. A combi neck gives you further fit and coverage options for fly-free turnout.

name: Arika Armour-Tek Fly Rug Stone
description: A super lightweight fly sheet with 85% UV protection for technically advanced fly defence in warm weather. Innovative micro mesh, which provides a second skin fit and a highly breathable barrier from flies and bugs, helps regulate your horse's temperature. The patented two-part skirt provides a break in tension around the hemline, for freedom of movement while grazing or playing in the field. The extended, shaped belly flap maximises coverage and features a three-strap surcingle with a detachable central strap. Antibacterial, anti-static lining enhances shine on the coat while helping to self-right the rug. The design registered 45° angled T-bar front closure distributes pressure to prevent rubbing on the point of the shoulder and across the chest. An extra-long tail flap with an elasticated PVC-coated fillet strap guards the rear end. A detachable neck with a lined mane panel offers optional extra cover.

name: Arika Shower-Tek Fly Rug Navy
description: The Arika Shower-Tek Fly Rug is an innovative hybrid rug ideal for unpredictable weather conditions. A durable 600 Denier diamond ripstop waterproof topline section helps to protect the back by preventing rain scald and sun bleaching, with 85% UV protection. Its seamless spine helps to self-right the rug. The lightweight breathable lower micromesh section provides a barrier against flies and bugs and promotes airflow. The design-registered 45° angled T-bar front closure distributes pressure to prevent rubbing on the point of shoulder and across the chest. The extended, shaped belly flap maximises coverage and features a three-strap closure with a detachable central strap. Our patented two-part skirt creates a break in the hemline to relieve tension around your horse's body, for unrestricted movement in the field. The lightweight, detachable neck with contoured waterproof mane panel offers optional extra protection.

name: Kudos AeroGuard Fly Rug Silver
description: The Kudos AeroGuard Fly Rug is the ultimate technical fly defence. Crafted in ripshield mesh, it's engineered in durable nylon and monofilament polyester for a structure that shapes around your horse's body to protect them from flies. The structured yet lightweight ripshield mesh makes this fly rug highly breathable, naturally repelling water and encouraging rapid drying. The extended, shaped belly flap maximises coverage and features a three-strap closure with a detachable central strap that helps to self-right the rug. The trigger clip front fastening system makes for easy rug changes. Antibacterial and anti-static lined, it's ideal for all-day comfort. Our patented two-part skirt provides a break in the hemline and relieves tension allowing for a greater range of movement. For the best fit on a 'fuller across the belly' or deeper-chested horse, size up.

name: Ride On Fly Rug Grey
description: Ride out with full body fly protection from this lightweight mesh fly exercise sheet adapted to wearing with tack. A saddle cutout and detachable neck and shoulder protection lend practicality for riders, while a handy loop to attach the neck to the bridle will prevent movement or flapping. The shoulder and mane are lined to enhance comfort and shine on the coat. A soft detachable fillet cord keeps the rear end secure, with a long tail flap to ward off flies as you ride.

name: Kudos Shower Pro Waterproof Fly Rug Grey
description: Essential defence from flies and biting insects in wet weather, this waterproof fly rug is made from durable 420 Denier Diamond Ripstop fabric. Diamond Ripstop has enhanced durability, meaning you can choose a lighter rug with a lower Denier count than traditional Ripstop fabric without compromising on toughness. It is designed with full body protection in mind and features breathable micro-mesh with full coverage under the belly. 3D mesh wither padding is incorporated, a testament to our commitment to your horse's comfort and breathability. The antistatic and antibacterial lining on the back, shoulders, and neck prevents rubbing and enhances shine. The full neck, which secures over the ears, is detachable, meaning the cover is flexible. The extra-long tail flap protects the sensitive tail and dock areas. Deep shoulder gussets are a key feature in ensuring your horse's freedom of movement in the field. LeMieux's unique patented two-part skirt delivers a beak in tension around the rear hemline, making this an incredibly comfortable rug for your horse to wear.

name: Kudos Sweet Itch Rug Stone
description: Expertly designed for sweet itch comfort and protection, made in durable and lightweight Oxford weave fabric with a perforated neoprene wither. The full coverage neck with ear holes, lined mane and extra long tail flap defends sweet itch prone horses' most sensitive areas. The long length and full belly coverage keeps your horse under wraps for maximum protection against sweet itch causing insects and dirt. To guarantee comfort and freedom in the field, LeMieux's unique design-registered 45° angled T-bar front closure removes pressure across the point of the shoulder. The elasticated angled shoulder gusset and patented two-part skirt system creates a break in tension around the hemline for full freedom of movement to play and graze.

description: Keep irritating flies at bay with the Visor-Tek Fly Mask. Made from breathable black mesh for improved visibility with a distinctive hexagon pattern, this mask ensures a clear, unobstructed view without compromising on comfort. It also provides 70% overall UV protection. The generous fit over the eye darts allows for clearance across both eyes. Plus, the polar fleece binding around the edge and below the ears allow for breathability and help prevent rubbing. We've also added smooth stretch mesh across the ears for extra breathability – especially in summer – while protecting your horse from flies. The extended nose section provides sensitive noses with even further protection from the sun. Offered in our seasonal colours you can coordinate your look in style!

name: Bug Relief Half Fly Mask Powder Blue
description: Provide your horse with relief from flies, bugs and other irritants with the Bug Relief Half Mask. With 75% UV protection, it's a must-have accessory during warm spring and summer months. Anatomically shaped for security and comfort, the soft, four-way stretch fabric provides a close and comfortable fit. The pull-on design minimises the chance of rubbing and stops any flies from getting under the mask. Bug-eye eye darts maximise freedom and visibility around the eyes, while breathable mesh ears provide airflow to keep your horse cool and comfortable. A forelock slit offers increased comfort and security.

The durable eye mesh is black in colour to assist your horse's vision in bright sunlight. A fleece bound edge across the nose and a nose fringe keeps flies at bay the traditional way. A forelock slit and single hook and loop strap fastening secures the mask.

name: Vetroflex
description: A targeted supplement containing a completely natural proprietary peptide blend of hydrolysed collagen to support strong, flexible and healthy joints and bones. Vetroflex Original has been scientifically formulated to help horses and ponies maintain supple movement and flexibility. Vetroflex Original is free from banned ingredients and is safe to use with the performance horse. How it works? Supporting healthy cartilage in your horse's joints, ligaments and tendons is fundamental to performance in equines, however wear and tear can occur at any age and active equines are particularly susceptible. Cartilage protects the horse's joints and bones from friction caused by everyday movement. The articular cartilage forms a hard slippery coating on the end of each bone. It contains collagen and proteoglycans that interweave with the collagen to form a mesh-like tissue allowing cartilage to flex and absorb physical shock. Collagen is the most abundant protein in the body. It provides the structural matrix for bones, joints and connective tissue and is therefore an essential component of joint care, health and mobility. Vetroflex Orginal has been scientifically formulated to create the optimum blend of amino acids to mimic the structural components of cartilage and stimulate collagen production by chondrocytes embedded in the extra-cellular matrix. Vetroflex Original is a pure peptide protein complex that has been scientifically formulated to ensure rapid and maximal absorption to enable your horse to strengthen and protect the joint. Vetroflex Original works by protecting cartilage and synovial fluid against deterioration whilst stimulating the cartilage cells to promote more collagen and proteoglycans. Vetroflex Original has the same amino acid composition as collagen and supplies the amino acids such as glycine and proline, of particular importance for the synthesis of collagen.

The cells in the horse's body generally exist in a balance whereby any harmful metabolic compounds that are produced are constantly neutralised by the body's own defence mechanisms. However sometimes external challenges, such as exercise, being stabled, or the little stresses of everyday life mean that equilibrium is disrupted, as the body's own supply of antioxidants is overrun. For example it has shown that being stabled raises antioxidant requirements at lung level, and muscles and joints incur micro damage as part of normal wear and tear. It makes sense therefore that a daily addition that provides extra dietary antioxidant will provide the essential extra required. What is it? Vetrofen Healthy is a proprietary blend of three plant sources known for their effective plant antioxidant support, Acacia catechu, Boswellia and Curcumin, with added black pepper to aid absorption. Boswellia serrata (also known as Frankincense) has been used for centuries to support joint health; Acacia catechu has long being recognised in ayurvedic practitioners for its antioxidant properties and curcumin, from fenugreek is similarly revered in India as a n antioxidant. How it works? Vetrofen Healthy approaches ongoing support of comfort and mobility by uniquely addressing the supply of dietary antioxidants to the metabolic processes involved. Vetrofen Healthy harnesses the power of specific plant phytochemicals - polyphenols, flavanols and triterpenes - from natural sources. Each work synergistically to provide support to key areas where antioxidant support is required on a daily basis in the joints and muscles, and to the immune system. What it does? Vetrofen Healthy provides additional antioxidant nutrients to support the body's own inflammatory response mechanisms. The specific antioxidants work synergistically at cell level to support comfort, function and flexibility in joints, muscles, ligaments and tendons. The concentrated and varied antioxidant profile of Vetrofen Healthy works to promote overall well being and quality of life for your horse.
